title: Existential Risk from Power-Seeking AI (audio essay)
summary: Carlsmith's careful, accessible audio essay laying out the case that power-seeking AI poses an existential risk. Good single entry-point to the argument.

title: An Overview of Catastrophic AI Risks
summary: Light-read survey of the main categories of catastrophic AI risk — useful as a first map of the territory.

title: Opportunities to Strengthen U.S. Biosecurity from AI-Enabled Bioterrorism
summary: Policy analysis on what governments can do to harden biosecurity against AI-amplified bioterrorism risks.

title: Risks from Biological Research
summary: Two leading biosecurity researchers discuss how AI changes the landscape of biorisk, and what to do about it.

title: Mitigating catastrophic biorisks
summary: Talk on what concrete mitigations look like for AI-amplified biorisks.

title: A Biosecurity and Biorisk Reading List
summary: Curated reading list spanning biosecurity policy, dual-use research, and AI's role.

title: Lethal Autonomous Weapon Systems research directory (up to 2023)
summary: Directory of academic research on lethal autonomous weapons systems. A starting point for serious reading on the topic.

title: Stop Killer Robots
summary: International coalition advocating against the development and use of lethal autonomous weapons. Good place to find current campaigns and news.

title: Slaughterbots — if human: kill()
summary: Five-minute dramatised short film imagining a future of weaponised drone swarms — designed to make the abstract risk visceral.
